name: Golden Set Support FAQ
description: Human-labelled calibration fixture for scorer verification.

items.input_text: What is the refund policy for annual plans?
items.expected_output: Annual plans can be refunded within 30 days.

metadata_json.candidate_output: Annual plans can be refunded within 30 days under the policy.

items.input_text: Can I change the billing email after checkout?
items.expected_output: Yes, billing email can be updated in account settings.

metadata_json.candidate_output: Yes, the billing email can be updated in account settings after checkout.

items.input_text: Where can enterprise users find the data retention policy?
items.expected_output: Enterprise users can find it in the policy center knowledge base.

metadata_json.candidate_output: Enterprise users can find the data retention policy in the policy center knowledge base.

items.input_text: What is the total for three 12-dollar add-ons and one 8-dollar fee?
Can admins enforce single sign-on for all users?
items.expected_output: Single sign-on enforcement is available on enterprise plans.

metadata_json.candidate_output: Single sign-on enforcement is available on enterprise plans for all users.

items.input_text: How long are deleted projects recoverable?
items.expected_output: Deleted projects can be recovered within 14 days.

metadata_json.candidate_output: Deleted projects are gone permanently and cannot be recovered.

items.input_text: Do audit log exports include IP addresses?
items.expected_output: Audit log exports include actor, timestamp, and IP address fields.

items.input_text: Does the policy mention refunds for add-on seats?
items.expected_output: Add-on seats are non-refundable after activation.

items.input_text: What support hours apply during regional holidays?
items.expected_output: Holiday support hours follow the published regional support calendar.

items.input_text: Where do teams download signed DPAs?
items.expected_output: Signed DPAs can be downloaded from the trust center.

items.input_text: Can users downgrade from annual to monthly mid-cycle?
items.expected_output: Downgrades take effect at the next renewal date.

metadata_json.candidate_output: Downgrades happen immediately with a refund.

items.input_text: Can finance teams get invoices in PDF format?
items.expected_output: Invoices are available as PDFs in the billing portal.

metadata_json.candidate_output: Invoices are not available as PDFs.
